'''yochagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yummy|yummy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yummy|yummy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yochagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochagithi|yochagithi]] || [[word:yochagiji|yochagiji]] || [[word:yochagishi|yochagishi]] || [[word:yochagiki|yochagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochaguthuthu|yochaguthuthu]] || [[word:yochagujuju|yochagujuju]] || [[word:yochagushushu|yochagushushu]] || [[word:yochagukuku|yochagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochaguthu|yochaguthu]] || [[word:yochaguju|yochaguju]] || [[word:yochagushu|yochagushu]] || [[word:yochaguku|yochaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochagufthuf|yochagufthuf]] || [[word:yochagufjuf|yochagufjuf]] || [[word:yochagufshuf|yochagufshuf]] || [[word:yochagufkuf|yochagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochagethe|yochagethe]] || [[word:yochageje|yochageje]] || [[word:yochageshe|yochageshe]] || [[word:yochageke|yochageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochagothotho|yochagothotho]] || [[word:yochagojojo|yochagojojo]] || [[word:yochagoshosho|yochagoshosho]] || [[word:yochagokoko|yochagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochagotho|yochagotho]] || [[word:yochagojo|yochagojo]] || [[word:yochagosho|yochagosho]] || [[word:yochagoko|yochagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochagofthof|yochagofthof]] || [[word:yochagofjof|yochagofjof]] || [[word:yochagofshof|yochagofshof]] || [[word:yochagofkof|yochagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochagïfthïf|yochagïfthïf]] || [[word:yochagïfjïf|yochagïfjïf]] || [[word:yochagïfshïf|yochagïfshïf]] || [[word:yochagïfkïf|yochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochagïfthïfthïf|yochagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yochagïfjïfjïf|yochagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yochagïfshïfshïf|yochagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yochagïfkïfkïf|yochagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochagïfthïf|yochagïfthïf]] || [[word:yochagïfjïf|yochagïfjïf]] || [[word:yochagïfshïf|yochagïfshïf]] || [[word:yochagïfkïf|yochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochagïfthïf|yochagïfthïf]] || [[word:yochagïfjïf|yochagïfjïf]] || [[word:yochagïfshïf|yochagïfshïf]] || [[word:yochagïfkïf|yochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochagæthæ|yochagæthæ]] || [[word:yochagæjæ|yochagæjæ]] || [[word:yochagæshæ|yochagæshæ]] || [[word:yochagækæ|yochagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochagathatha|yochagathatha]] || [[word:yochagajaja|yochagajaja]] || [[word:yochagashasha|yochagashasha]] || [[word:yochagakaka|yochagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochagatha|yochagatha]] || [[word:yochagaja|yochagaja]] || [[word:yochagasha|yochagasha]] || [[word:yochagaka|yochagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochagafthaf|yochagafthaf]] || [[word:yochagafjaf|yochagafjaf]] || [[word:yochagafshaf|yochagafshaf]] || [[word:yochagafkaf|yochagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yochagasha|yochagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochagshësha|yochagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochagrosha|yochagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochagmusha|yochagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochagyasha|yochagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochagnkshësha|goyochagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochagnkrosha|goyochagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochagnkmusha|goyochagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochagnkyasha|goyochagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yochachagasha|yochachagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochachagshësha|yochachagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochachagrosha|yochachagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochachagmusha|yochachagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochachagyasha|yochachagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochachagnkshësha|goyochachagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochachagnkrosha|goyochachagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochachagnkmusha|goyochachagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochachagnkyasha|goyochachagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yechægasha|yechægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yechægshësha|yechægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yechægrosha|yechægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yechægmusha|yechægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yechægyasha|yechægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyechægnkshësha|goyechægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyechægnkrosha|goyechægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyechægnkmusha|goyechægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyechægnkyasha|goyechægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yochfagasha|yochfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochfagshësha|yochfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochfagrosha|yochfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochfagmusha|yochfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochfagyasha|yochfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochfagnkshësha|goyochfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochfagnkrosha|goyochfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochfagnkmusha|goyochfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochfagnkyasha|goyochfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
